title: Moonlight Harvest
description: A modpack to satisfy all your cottage-core dreams!
body:
Welcome to the Moonlight Harvest Modpack, your ultimate retreat into a world of tranquillity and creativity! This modpack is designed for players who want to unwind and explore at their own pace, featuring a curated selection of mods that enhance the game's serene aspects. If you like vanilla minecraft with a *dash* of extra cosiness then this mod pack is the one for you! 

Some of the features we love that we think you will too include;

**Cottage Core Aesthetics**: Build quaint cottages and cosy farms with an array of building materials and decorative items that bring your dream home to life.

**Nature's Bounty**: Enjoy farming and foraging with mods that add new crops, plants, and crafting recipes, allowing you to create delicious meals and unique items. You can even build a functioning greenhouse to keep those pesky temperatures at bay!

**Light Exploration**: Roam free in every biome with no worry of getting yourself lost! Worry free exploration with your mini map.

**Welcoming Warmth**: Ever wanted some extra comfort around that fireplace you built? Well now you've got it with the amazing healing campfires!

Whether you're building your dream home, tending to your garden, or exploring serene landscapes, the Moonlight Harvest Minecraft Modpack is your perfect escape into a world where relaxation and creativity reign supreme. Grab your favourite snacks, settle in, and enjoy your cosy adventure!
